MetroCity - Free Top Down Character Pack

Author: JIK-A-4
Source: https://jik-a-4.itch.io/metrocity-free-topdown-character-pack
License: Creative Commons Zero 1.0 Universal (CC0)
License URL: https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/

The source page states that the pack is free to use and that attribution is
optional. This repository keeps the author credit and source URL in its asset
metadata.
